nasb.text: Now the heart of the king of Aram was enraged over this thing; and he called his servants and said to them, “Will you tell me which of us is for the king of Israel?”

esv.text: And the mind of the king of Syria was greatly troubled because of this thing, and he called his servants and said to them, “Will you not show me who of us is for the king of Israel?”

cnv.text: 亞蘭王因為這事心中大感困惑，他召了他的臣僕來，對他們說：“在我們中間有誰幫助以色列王，你們不告訴我嗎？”

ccb.text: 亚兰王因此十分恼怒，召来臣仆质问他们：“你们当中谁向以色列王泄露了我们的计划？”
